name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from mushrooms and chop the stems.
2. Brown the stems, garlic, and green onions in 1 teaspoon of butter until golden brown.
3. Mix the browned ingredients with the remaining ingredients: bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, melted butter, and chopped green onion.
4. Wash mushroom caps and pat them dry.
5. Fill each mushroom cap with the prepared filling.
6. Spray an 8x8 pan with olive oil spray.
7. Place the stuffed mushrooms in the pan and spray their tops with olive oil.
8. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes.
